sentences.text: Hi, Kerry. This is Peter with rentable was wanted to touch base with you. I don't know if you remember or not we've been we've had a couple of conversations with United apartment group about a potential partnership. I thinking a lot of meetings with a lot of property managers and some other Regional managers in the portfolio. I've been talking to Karen rain water Jackie Jackson and again a few other properties. I'm all seem to be really interested in putting rentable across the board. I just know that I think the decision lies with you wanted to see if I can get fifteen twenty minutes of your time. Let me know what that looks like my direct call back number is nine five six four seven two four two eight zero, Peter with rentable nine five six four seven two four two eight zero look forward to hearing from you.

Thank you for calling United apartment group our normal office hours are Monday through Friday eight thirty to five thirty. If you know your party's extension you may dial it now for a dial by name directory press two. If you are a residence. Please enter the first three letters of the last name of the person you are trying to contact. To call to Todd girgis press zero to call to carry gargus press one to exit press pound record your message and press pound or press Star to contact the operator.
